pred_reason: SWC-101 is applicable due to identified integer overflow/underflow in arithmetic operations without consistent SafeMath usage. SWC-107 fits because of multiple critical reentrancy vulnerabilities found in functions like swapAndLiquify and withdrawAnyToken without proper guards. Evidence: Integer overflow/underflow found in arithmetic operations (Task 5); Reentrancy in swapAndLiquify function (Task 1); Reentrancy in withdrawAnyToken function (Task 2)
